description:
Prepare the full-scale eCRM-001 aircraft model for a sub-scale wind tunnel test. 

1. Read the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/wt_prep_spec.txt.
2. In OpenVSP, open /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wind_tunnel.vsp3.
3. Scale the ENTIRE parametric model by a factor of 0.01 (representing a 1:100 scale model). Use Model > Scale Model to apply this to all components.
4. Add a new 'Pod' geometry component to act as the mounting hardware.
5. Rename this new component exactly to 'Sting'.
6. Set the Sting's Length to 0.3 m and Fineness Ratio to 15.0.
7. Position the Sting at the rear of the scaled model using the XForm tab (X Location should be ~0.60 m so it intersects the aft fuselage and extends straight backwards).
8. Save the prepared model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/wt_model.vsp3.
9. Export the combined assembly as a triangulated STL mesh to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/wt_model.stl.
